content:
{
  "sentences": [
    {
      "text": "可以給我一杯水嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ yī bēi shuǐ ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 yi1 bei1 shui3 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a glass of water?",
      "translation_ko": "물 한 잔 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我點一杯拿鐵嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ diǎn yī bēi nátiě ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 dian3 yi1 bei1 na2tie3 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you help me order a latte?",
      "translation_ko": "라떼 한 잔 주문해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我看菜單嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ kàn càidān ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 kan4 cai4dan1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you show me the menu?",
      "translation_ko": "메뉴를 보여 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我一個袋子嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ yī gè dàizi ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 yi1 ge4 dai4zi5 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a bag?",
      "translation_ko": "봉투 하나 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我加珍珠嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ jiā zhēnzhū ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 jia1 zhen1zhu1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you add boba for me?",
      "translation_ko": "펄을 추가해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我半糖的紅茶嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ bàn táng de hóngchá ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 ban4 tang2 de5 hong2cha2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me half-sugar black tea?",
      "translation_ko": "당도 반으로 한 홍차 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我外帶嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ wàidài ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 wai4dai4 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you make it to go?",
      "translation_ko": "포장해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我一杯去冰的綠茶嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ yī bēi qù bīng de lǜchá ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 yi1 bei1 qu4 bing1 de5 lü4cha2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a green tea with no ice?",
      "translation_ko": "�음 없는 녹차 한 잔 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我兩根吸管嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ liǎng gēn xīguǎn ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 liang3 gen1 xi1guan3 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me two straws?",
      "translation_ko": "빨대 두 개 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我內用嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ nèiyòng ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 nei4yong4 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can I have it for here?",
      "translation_ko": "매장에서 먹을게요."
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我一個湯匙嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ yī gè tāngchí ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 yi1 ge4 tang1chi2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a spoon?",
      "translation_ko": "숟가락 하나 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我少冰嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ shǎo bīng ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 shao3 bing1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you make it less ice?",
      "translation_ko": "얼음 적게 해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我看價錢嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ kàn jiàqián ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 kan4 jia4qian2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you show me the price?",
      "translation_ko": "가격을 보여 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我拿發票嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ ná fāpiào ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 na2 fa1piao4 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me the receipt?",
      "translation_ko": "영수증 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我一個叉子嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ yī gè chāzi ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 yi1 ge4 cha1zi5 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a fork?",
      "translation_ko": "포크 하나 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我點一杯豆漿嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ diǎn yī bēi dòujiāng ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 dian3 yi1 bei1 dou4jiang1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you help me order a soy milk?",
      "translation_ko": "두유 한 잔 주문해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我正常甜的咖啡嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ zhèngcháng tián de kāfēi ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 zheng4chang2 tian2 de5 ka1fei1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me regular sweetness coffee?",
      "translation_ko": "보통 당도 커피 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我加珍珠和半糖嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ jiā zhēnzhū hé bàn táng ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 jia1 zhen1zhu1 he2 ban4 tang2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you add boba and half sugar for me?",
      "translation_ko": "펄 추가하고 당도 반으로 해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我一張衛生紙嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ yī zhāng wèishēngzhǐ ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 yi1 zhang1 wei4sheng1zhi3 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a tissue?",
      "translation_ko": "휴지 한 장 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我慢一點說嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ màn yīdiǎn shuō ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 man4 yi1dian3 shuo1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you speak a little slower?",
      "translation_ko": "조금 천천히 말해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我中杯的拿鐵嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ zhōng bēi de nátiě ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 zhong1 bei1 de5 na2tie3 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a medium latte?",
      "translation_ko": "중간 사이즈 라떼 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我再用一次嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ zài yòng yīcì ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 zai4 yong4 yi1ci4 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you do it again for me?",
      "translation_ko": "다시 한 번 해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我小杯的紅茶嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ xiǎo bēi de hóngchá ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 xiao3 bei1 de5 hong2cha2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a small black tea?",
      "translation_ko": "작은 사이즈 홍차 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我試一下嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ shì yīxià ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 shi4 yi1xia4 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you try it for me?",
      "translation_ko": "한 번 시도해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我大杯的綠茶嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ dà bēi de lǜchá ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 da4 bei1 de5 lü4cha2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a large green tea?",
      "translation_ko": "큰 사이즈 녹차 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我加微糖嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ jiā wēi táng ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 jia1 wei1 tang2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you add a little sugar for me?",
      "translation_ko": "당도 약간만 추가해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我看一下嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ kàn yīxià ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 kan4 yi1xia4 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you let me take a look?",
      "translation_ko": "잠깐 보여 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我外帶一杯咖啡嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ wàidài yī bēi kāfēi ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 wai4dai4 yi1 bei1 ka1fei1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you pack a coffee to go for me?",
      "translation_ko": "커피 한 잔 포장해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我一個大袋子嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ yī gè dà dàizi ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 yi1 ge4 da4 dai4zi5 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a large bag?",
      "translation_ko": "큰 봉투 하나 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我再用悠遊卡嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ zài yòng yōuyóukǎ ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 zai4 yong4 you1you2ka3 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you use the EasyCard again for me?",
      "translation_ko": "유유카드로 다시 해 주시겠어요?"
    }
  ]
}
